BulkInsertWebMessages is separate from single InsertWebMessage — used for batch wizard operations.
GetActiveWebMessages when fromUtc > now: uses GetPlannedAfter — returns scheduled-future messages.
GetActiveWebMessages when fromUtc is null or before now: uses (now, now) as active window — returns only currently active.
MergeWebMessagesBySmsGroupIdAndTypeIdAsync: upsert merge (not replace) — keyed on SmsGroupId + TypeId pair.
WebMessage read uses DateTimeOffset (not DateTime) to preserve UTC — prevents server local-time conversion errors.
Webhook action strings: 'created', 'updated', 'deleted' — sent to external webhook subscribers.
completedAsActive=true flag causes SetWebMessageCompleted messages to appear in active reads.
if truly empty (use empty list, not null).
includeDrafts=false by default — drafts are WebMessages created during wizard where wizard was not completed.
must be plain English or well-known identifiers.
